body: I'll add back performance tests for P3 scheme once we have the whole scheme working and we get rid of quadgk.
title: tmp remove P3 scheme from performance tests

body:
This PR adds an approximation for incomplete gamma function and then uses it to compute the upper limit for numerical integrals in the P3 scheme.

This considerably slows down the computations compared to just guessing the upper limit. After some more testing we may want to just use the guess. Or optimize this more.
title: Add lower incomplete gamma function approximation
